text: Health officials warn of leptospirosis risk after Hawaii floods - Honolulu Star-Advertiser
fullText: The Hawaii Department of Health and Hawaiian Humane Society are urging residents and recovery workers to monitor for signs of leptospirosis in the aftermath of the “Kona low” storm floods.
